svg.text: Scientific Hypothesis Agent for Novel Discovery — System Architecture
SHANDY is an autonomous scientific discovery platform that runs Claude Code CLI as a headless AI agent. It iteratively explores datasets,
formulates hypotheses, tests them through statistical analysis and literature review, and produces research reports with full provenance.
Two modes: fully autonomous discovery loops or collaborative coinvestigation with scientist feedback. Multi-tenant via PostgreSQL RLS.

g.text: API key auth · Bearer token · tested
✓ OAuth tokens encrypted at rest — Fernet symmetric encryption via TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY
Discovery loop · CLI subprocess · session mgmt
LLM Q&A about job results and findings
ZIP export of reports · plots · provenance
job_manager.py · orchestrator.py · knowledge_state.py · cost_tracker.py · job_chat.py · pdf_generator.py
Each job runs in isolated shandy-executor container · Docker SDK spawns siblings via /var/run/docker.sock
mem_limit=2g · cpu_limit=50% · network_disabled · read_only=false (plots) · auto-cleanup on completion
FastMCP · provenance/artifact storage · plot auto-save · lazy data loading
SQLAlchemy ORM · asyncpg · Alembic migrations · UUID v7 PKs · CASCADE deletes
PostgreSQL evaluates policies per-row using session variable
bypass_rls() context manager for admin / migration operations
data/ — uploaded data files (CSV, Excel, HDF5, AnnData)
DB ⇄ Filesystem dual sync via KnowledgeState
Provider selection: CLAUDE_PROVIDER env var (cborg | anthropic | vertex | bedrock)
✓ Bot/API Client — Full REST API with /jobs, /keys, /shares endpoints
✓ OAuth Token Encryption — Fernet encryption at rest via TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY
✓ AWS Bedrock — Provider fully implemented with Cost Explorer API
○ OpenAI Codex — Provider stub created (codex.py), implementation pending
✓ Sibling Container Isolation — Docker SDK spawns isolated executor containers
Python 3.10+ · NiceGUI · FastAPI · SQLAlchemy · asyncpg · PostgreSQL 18 · Claude Code CLI · FastMCP · Docker
Terms and technologies used in this architecture, explained for non-technical stakeholders
Docker containers spawned by the main container to run code in isolation — like separate secure rooms
Software that packages applications into isolated, portable containers that run anywhere
Industry-standard login protocol — "Sign in with GitHub" uses this. You don't share passwords.
Database feature ensuring users can only see their own data — built into PostgreSQL
Model Context Protocol — standard interface for AI assistants to use tools (execute code, search, etc.)
Python framework for building web interfaces with real-time updates (no JavaScript needed)
Modern Python framework for building REST APIs with automatic documentation and validation
Python library for database access — translates Python code to SQL database queries
Symmetric encryption standard — same key encrypts and decrypts. Used for OAuth token storage.
Anthropic's command-line AI assistant that SHANDY runs as an autonomous agent
Open-source relational database with advanced features like RLS. Version 18 used here.
Standard way for programs to communicate over HTTP — enables bot/automation access
